registryMetadata.name: ALZ Compliance Ontology
registryMetadata.description: Ontology for Azure Landing Zone compliance management and snapshot audits, mapping controls across MCSB v1/v2, NIST 800-53, UK NCSC, ISO 27001, Azure Well-Architected Framework (WAF), and Cloud Adoption Framework (CAF) for Insurance Advisory sector

entities.name: ComplianceFramework
entities.description: A regulatory or industry compliance framework that defines security and governance controls for cloud environments

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: Compliance frameworks are collections of defined terms (controls)

entities.name: ComplianceControl
entities.description: A specific security or governance requirement within a compliance framework that can be implemented and audited

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: Controls are defined terms with specific implementation requirements

entities.name: WAFPillar
entities.description: One of the five Azure Well-Architected Framework pillars that define quality attributes for cloud workloads: Reliability, Security, Cost Optimization, Operational Excellence, Performance Efficiency

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: WAF pillars are defined quality attributes with specific assessment criteria

entities.name: CAFPhase
entities.description: A phase in the Microsoft Cloud Adoption Framework journey: Strategy, Plan, Ready, Adopt, Govern, Manage

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: CAF phases are defined stages in cloud adoption with specific activities

entities.name: SnapshotAudit
entities.description: A point-in-time automated assessment of an Azure environment capturing resource inventory, security posture, compliance alignment, and governance maturity within a compressed timeframe. Supports multiple runs with unique session identifiers for periodic re-audits and change tracking.

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: A snapshot audit is an action performed on an Azure environment producing results

properties.name: auditId
properties.description: Unique identifier for the audit engagement/project

properties.name: sessionId
properties.description: UUID for each unique audit execution run, enabling multiple runs per audit

properties.name: auditDate
properties.description: Scheduled or planned date of the audit

properties.name: runSequence
properties.description: Sequential run number for periodic re-audits (1, 2, 3...)

properties.name: previousSessionId
properties.description: Reference to previous session for delta comparison

entities.name: AuditQuery
entities.description: A KQL query executed against Azure Resource Graph to discover and assess Azure resources for compliance and architecture quality

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: Audit queries are source code (KQL) that extract data from Azure

entities.name: AuditResult
entities.description: The output data captured from executing an audit query, containing discovered resources, compliance status, or assessment metrics

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: Audit results are datasets produced by query execution

entities.name: ControlMapping
entities.description: A mapping relationship between equivalent controls across different compliance frameworks enabling cross-framework compliance assessment

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: Mappings are property-value associations between controls

entities.name: AzureResource
entities.description: An Azure cloud resource that can be configured and audited for compliance with security controls

entities.name: ControlImplementation
entities.description: The specific Azure configuration or policy that implements a compliance control for a resource type

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: Implementations are actions taken to achieve compliance

entities.name: ComplianceAssessment
entities.description: A point-in-time evaluation of an Azure environment against compliance controls producing a compliance score

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: Assessments produce datasets of compliance results

entities.name: WAFAssessment
entities.description: An assessment of Azure workloads against the Well-Architected Framework pillars, capturing pillar-specific scores and recommendations

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: WAF assessments produce datasets of pillar-specific results

entities.name: ComplianceFinding
entities.description: A specific non-compliance issue identified during assessment with severity and remediation guidance

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: Findings are reports of compliance status

entities.name: InsuranceSectorRequirement
entities.description: A regulatory requirement specific to the insurance sector that must be addressed through cloud compliance controls

entities.name: AuditDeliverable
entities.description: A document or data artifact produced as output from a snapshot audit, such as executive summary, gap analysis, or resource inventory

schemaOrgAlignment.rationale: Deliverables are creative works (documents, reports) produced by the audit

relationships.name: frameworkContainsControl
relationships.description: A compliance framework contains multiple compliance controls as its constituent requirements

relationships.name: controlBelongsToFramework
relationships.description: A compliance control belongs to a specific compliance framework

relationships.name: auditExecutesQuery
relationships.description: A snapshot audit executes multiple audit queries to discover and assess the Azure environment

relationships.name: queryExecutedByAudit
relationships.description: An audit query is executed as part of a snapshot audit

relationships.name: queryProducesResult
relationships.description: An audit query produces audit results when executed against Azure Resource Graph

relationships.name: resultFromQuery
relationships.description: An audit result is produced by executing a specific audit query

relationships.name: queryAssessesWAFPillar
relationships.description: An audit query assesses resources against a specific WAF pillar

relationships.name: queryAssessesControl
relationships.description: An audit query assesses compliance against specific controls

relationships.name: auditProducesDeliverable
relationships.description: A snapshot audit produces deliverables as final outputs for the client

relationships.name: deliverableFromAudit
relationships.description: A deliverable is produced as output from a snapshot audit

relationships.name: auditGeneratesAssessment
relationships.description: A snapshot audit generates compliance and WAF assessments from collected results

relationships.name: resultDiscoversResource
relationships.description: An audit result discovers Azure resources during query execution

relationships.name: pillarAlignedToMCSB
relationships.description: A WAF pillar aligns to specific MCSB control domains for security assessment

relationships.name: auditAlignsToCAFPhase
relationships.description: A snapshot audit aligns to the Assessment phase of the Cloud Adoption Framework

relationships.name: controlMapsTo
relationships.description: A compliance control maps to an equivalent control in another framework via a control mapping

relationships.name: mappingConnectsControls
relationships.description: A control mapping connects a source control to a target control across frameworks

relationships.name: controlImplementedBy
relationships.description: A compliance control is implemented by a specific Azure configuration or policy

relationships.name: implementationSatisfiesControl
relationships.description: A control implementation satisfies the requirements of a compliance control

relationships.name: implementationAppliesToResource
relationships.description: A control implementation applies to a specific type of Azure resource

relationships.name: resourceEvaluatedInAssessment
relationships.description: An Azure resource is evaluated as part of a compliance assessment

relationships.name: assessmentCoversFramework
relationships.description: A compliance assessment covers and evaluates against a compliance framework

relationships.name: wafAssessmentCoversPillar
relationships.description: A WAF assessment covers and evaluates against specific WAF pillars

relationships.name: assessmentProducesFinding
relationships.description: A compliance assessment produces compliance findings as results

relationships.name: findingFromAssessment
relationships.description: A compliance finding results from a specific assessment

relationships.name: findingViolatesControl
relationships.description: A compliance finding indicates violation of a specific compliance control

relationships.name: findingAffectsResource
relationships.description: A compliance finding affects a specific Azure resource

relationships.name: sectorRequirementAddressedByControl
relationships.description: An insurance sector requirement is addressed by compliance controls

relationships.name: controlAddressesSectorRequirement
relationships.description: A compliance control addresses an insurance sector regulatory requirement

businessRules.name: Mandatory MCSB Assessment
businessRules.description: All ALZ implementations must be assessed against both MCSB v1 and MCSB v2
businessRules.ruleFormat: IF AzureLandingZone deployed THEN ComplianceAssessment MUST cover MCSB_v1 AND MCSB_v2

businessRules.name: Insurance Sector Compliance
businessRules.description: Insurance advisory workloads must address FCA and PRA requirements

businessRules.name: Critical Finding Remediation
businessRules.description: Critical severity findings must have high priority remediation

businessRules.name: Control Implementation Coverage
businessRules.description: Every compliance control must have at least one implementation

businessRules.name: Assessment Scope Completeness
businessRules.description: Compliance assessments must cover all subscriptions in scope
businessRules.ruleFormat: IF ComplianceAssessment created THEN assessmentScope MUST include all active subscriptions

businessRules.name: Cross-Framework Mapping Requirement
businessRules.description: Controls in primary frameworks must map to at least one other framework

businessRules.name: WAF Pillar Coverage
businessRules.description: Snapshot audits should assess all five WAF pillars for comprehensive quality evaluation
businessRules.ruleFormat: IF SnapshotAudit.status = 'completed' THEN auditGeneratesAssessment MUST include WAFAssessment covering all 5 pillars

businessRules.name: Query Must Produce Results
businessRules.description: Every executed audit query must produce at least one audit result

businessRules.name: Audit Deliverables Required
businessRules.description: Completed snapshot audits must produce minimum deliverables
businessRules.ruleFormat: IF SnapshotAudit.status = 'completed' THEN auditProducesDeliverable MUST include ExecutiveSummary AND ResourceInventory

businessRules.name: CAF Alignment
businessRules.description: Snapshot audits align to the Assessment phase of Cloud Adoption Framework
businessRules.ruleFormat: IF SnapshotAudit exists THEN auditAlignsToCAFPhase = 'Ready' phase (Assessment activity)

G4_PropertyMappings.details: All properties mapped to schema.org or rationale provided

changeControl.changeReason: Added session tracking to SnapshotAudit entity for multiple audit runs and periodic re-audits
changeControl.migrationGuide: SnapshotAudit entity enhanced with: sessionId (UUID per run), startedAt, completedAt timestamps, runSequence (for periodic audits), previousSessionId (for delta comparison). Enables multiple audit runs per engagement.

versionHistory.changes: Initial creation for Insurance Advisory ALZ MVP
Added WAF pillars, CAF phases, snapshot audit workflow entities (SnapshotAudit, AuditQuery, AuditResult, AuditDeliverable, WAFAssessment), and related relationships/business rules
Enhanced SnapshotAudit with session tracking: sessionId, startedAt, completedAt, runSequence, previousSessionId for multiple audit runs and periodic re-audits
